title: Quit with confidence: Guide to a smoke-free life - Canada.ca
content:
## Quit with confidence: Guide to a smoke-free life
Download in PDF format (1,656 KB, 2 pages)
Organization: Health Canada
Date published: November 2023
Equip yourself with the knowledge and skills to quit smoking with confidence.
- Tools for a smoke-free life
- Provincial and territorial quit services
- Smoke Free Curious: A national campaign to help people quit smoking
